select.isEqual:
SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT LIST.* FROM ( SELECT DOCID, DOCTITLE, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE, WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, HASATTACHYN, HASOPINIONYN, APRTYPE, FUNCTIONTYPE, APRMEMBERSN, URGENTAPPROVAL, 'APR' "MODE", companyID FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#lastDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRMEMBERID IN ($id$) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))
UNION ALL
SELECT DOCID, DOCTITLE, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE, WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, HASATTACHYN, HASOPINIONYN, APRTYPE, FUNCTIONTYPE, APRMEMBERSN, URGENTAPPROVAL, 'END' "MODE", companyID FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#lastDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRMEMBERID IN ($id$) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))
) LIST ORDER BY LIST.STARTDATE DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #listSize#

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT DOCID, DOCTITLE, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE, WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, HASATTACHYN, HASOPINIONYN, FUNCTIONTYPE, URGENTAPPROVAL, companyID FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#lastDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND DocState <> '017'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #listSize#

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT DOCID, DOCTITLE, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE, WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, HASATTACHYN, HASOPINIONYN, APRTYPE, FUNCTIONTYPE, URGENTAPPROVAL, companyID FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#lastDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND APRTYPE <> '015'
AND AprState != '001'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #listSize#

SELECT ENDT.* FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT A.DOCID, A.DOCTITLE, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE, A.WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, A.HASATTACHYN, A.HASOPINIONYN, B.APRTYPE, E.CODE2 FUNCTIONTYPE, C.URGENTAPPROVAL, A.companyID, C.securityApproval, A.ENDDATE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM tbl_endaprlineinfo exa JOIN ( SELECT MAX(exb.APRMEMBERSN) as MAX_APRMEMBERSN, exb.DOCID as MAX_DOCID FROM tbl_endaprlineinfo exb GROUP BY DOCID ) exc ON exa.APRMEMBERSN = exc.MAX_APRMEMBERSN AND exa.DOCID = exc.MAX_DOCID ) B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO C ON A.DOCID = C.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID
INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST E ON A.DOCSTATE = E.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST F ON A.FUNCTIONTYPE = F.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = F.COMPANYID
INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST E ON A.DOCSTATE = E.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND C.DELFLAG IS NULL AND A.ENDDATE < TO_DATE(#lastDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND B.APRMEMBERID = #userId#
AND E.CODE1 ='SA02' AND F.CODE1 ='A04'
AND E.CODE1 ='A02'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))
ORDER BY A.ENDDATE DESC ) ENDT WHERE ROWNUM <= #listSize#

SLEECT A.* FROM ( SELECT LIST.* FROM ( SELECT DOCID, DOCTITLE, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE, WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, HASATTACHYN, HASOPINIONYN, APRTYPE, FUNCTIONTYPE, APRMEMBERSN, URGENTAPPROVAL, 'APR' "MODE", companyID FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#lastDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRMEMBERID IN (SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND SHAREUSERID = #userId#) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))
UNION ALL
SELECT DOCID, DOCTITLE, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE, WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, HASATTACHYN, HASOPINIONYN, APRTYPE, FUNCTIONTYPE, APRMEMBERSN, URGENTAPPROVAL, 'END' "MODE", companyID FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#lastDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRMEMBERID IN (SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND SHAREUSERID = #userId#) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))
) LIST ORDER BY LIST.STARTDATE DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #listSize#

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT DOCID, DOCTITLE, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE, WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, HASATTACHYN, HASOPINIONYN, APRTYPE, FUNCTIONTYPE, APRMEMBERSN, URGENTAPPROVAL, COMPANYID FROM VGONGRAMAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#lastDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRTYPE = '015' AND APRMEMBERID = #userId#
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #listSize#

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, TO_CHAR(TBL_APRDOCINFO.STARTDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HASOPINIONYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRTYPE, TBL_APRDOCINFO.FUNCTIONTYPE, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN, TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.URGENTAPPROVAL, TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#lastDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRTYPE = '015' AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRSTATE = '010' AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #listSize#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DOCID FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND APRMEMBERID IN ($id$) AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))
UNION ALL
SELECT DOCID FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRMEMBERID IN ($id$) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))
) LIST

SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND DocState <> '017'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT DOCID, APRTYPE FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRTYPE <> '015'
AND AprState != '001'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))
)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM tbl_endaprlineinfo exa JOIN ( SELECT MAX(exb.APRMEMBERSN) as MAX_APRMEMBERSN, exb.DOCID as MAX_DOCID FROM tbl_endaprlineinfo exb GROUP BY DOCID ) exc ON exa.APRMEMBERSN = exc.MAX_APRMEMBERSN AND exa.DOCID = exc.MAX_DOCID ) B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO C ON A.DOCID = C.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID
INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST E ON A.DOCSTATE = E.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST F ON A.FUNCTIONTYPE = F.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = F.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO G ON A.DOCID = G.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = G.COMPANYID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND C.DELFLAG IS NULL AND A.ENDDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND B.APRMEMBERID = #userId#
AND E.CODE1 ='SA02' AND F.CODE1 ='A04'
(A.DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR A.WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DOCID FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND APRMEMBERID IN (SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND SHAREUSERID = #userId#) AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))
UNION ALL
SELECT DOCID FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRMEMBERID IN (SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND SHAREUSERID = #userId#) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))
) LIST

SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VGONGRAMAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND APRTYPE = '015'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))

SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON (TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID) WHERE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN = #userId# UNION ALL SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRTYPE = '015' AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRSTATE = '010'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchText#), '%'))

sqlMap.select:
SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DOCID FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($id$) AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1
UNION ALL
SELECT DOCID FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRMEMBERID IN ($id$) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1) LIST ) aprDoCount, (SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND DocState <> '017') aprDraftCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT DOCID, APRTYPE FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRTYPE <> '015'
AND AprState != '001'
) ) aprIngCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT A.DOCID, B.APRTYPE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO C ON A.DOCID = C.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID
INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST E ON A.DOCSTATE = E.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST F ON A.FUNCTIONTYPE = F.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = F.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO G ON A.DOCID = G.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = G.COMPANYID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND C.DELFLAG IS NULL AND A.ENDDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND B.APRMEMBERID = #userId#
AND E.CODE1 ='SA02' AND F.CODE1 ='A04'
) ) aprEndCount
,( SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM (SELECT DOCID FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID IN (SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND SHAREUSERID = #userId#) AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1
UNION ALL
SELECT DOCID FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRMEMBERID IN (SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND SHAREUSERID = #userId#) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1) LIST ) aprShareCount
,(SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VGONGRAMAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND APRTYPE = '015' ) gongRamCount ,(SELECT COUNT(TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID) FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRTYPE = '015' AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRSTATE = '010' ) gongRamEndCount FROM DUAL

select.isNotEqual: SELECT A.APRMEMBERID, A.APRSTATE, A.APRTYPE, CASE WHEN (A.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ = '' OR A.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN A.APRMEMBERNAME ELSE A.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ END APRMEMBERNAME, CASE WHEN (A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE ELSE A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ END APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, CASE WHEN (A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME ELSE A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ END APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, TO_CHAR(A.RECEIVEDDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RECEIVEDDATE, TO_CHAR(A.PROCESSDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') PROCESSDATE, CASE WHEN (B.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ = '' OR B.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN B.PROXYUSERNAME ELSE B.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ END PROXYUSERNAME, CASE WHEN (B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE ELSE B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ END PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, CASE WHEN (B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME ELSE B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ END PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = A.APRMEMBERID) APRMEMBERPHOTO FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO A INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRLINE B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.APRMEMBERSN = B.APRMEMBERSN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.DOCID = #docID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY A.APRMEMBERSN DESC
select.isEqual: SELECT A.APRMEMBERID, A.APRSTATE, A.APRTYPE, CASE WHEN (A.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ = '' OR A.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN A.APRMEMBERNAME ELSE A.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ END APRMEMBERNAME, CASE WHEN (A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE ELSE A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ END APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, CASE WHEN (A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME ELSE A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ END APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, TO_CHAR(A.RECEIVEDDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RECEIVEDDATE, TO_CHAR(A.PROCESSDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') PROCESSDATE, CASE WHEN (B.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ = '' OR B.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN B.PROXYUSERNAME ELSE B.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ END PROXYUSERNAME, CASE WHEN (B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE ELSE B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ END PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, CASE WHEN (B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME ELSE B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ END PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = A.APRMEMBERID) APRMEMBERPHOTO FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO A INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.APRMEMBERSN = B.APRMEMBERSN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.DOCID = #docID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY A.APRMEMBERSN DESC

select.isEqual: SELECT DOCID, ORGDOCID, FORMID, HREF, HASATTACHYN, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, DOCSTATE, DOCTITLE, CASE WHEN (WRITERNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERNAME ELSE WRITERNAME$lang$ END WRITERNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERDEPTNAME ELSE WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ END WRITERDEPTNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERJOBTITLE ELSE WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ END WRITERJOBTITLE, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT DOCID, ORGDOCID, FORMID, HREF, HASATTACHYN, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, DOCSTATE, DOCTITLE, CASE WHEN (WRITERNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERNAME ELSE WRITERNAME$lang$ END WRITERNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERDEPTNAME ELSE WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ END WRITERDEPTNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERJOBTITLE ELSE WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ END WRITERJOBTITLE, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT A.DOCID, A.ORGDOCID, A.FORMID, A.HREF, A.HASATTACHYN, B.APRMEMBERID, B.APRMEMBERNAME, B.APRMEMBERNAME2, B.APRMEMBERDEPTID, A.DOCSTATE, A.DOCTITLE, CASE WHEN (A.WRITERNAME$lang$ = '' OR A.WRITERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERNAME ELSE A.WRITERNAME$lang$ END WRITERNAME, CASE WHEN (A.WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR A.WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERDEPTNAME ELSE A.WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ END WRITERDEPTNAME, CASE WHEN (A.WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR A.WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERJOBTITLE ELSE A.WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ END WRITERJOBTITLE, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO C ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID
INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST E ON A.DOCSTATE = E.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST F ON A.FUNCTIONTYPE = F.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = F.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO G ON A.DOCID = G.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = G.COMPANYID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.DOCID = #docID#
AND E.CODE1 ='SA02' AND F.CODE1 ='A04'
AND ROWNUM = 1

select.isEqual: SELECT DOCID, ORGDOCID, FORMID, HREF, HASATTACHYN, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, DOCSTATE, DOCTITLE, CASE WHEN (WRITERNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERNAME ELSE WRITERNAME$lang$ END WRITERNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERDEPTNAME ELSE WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ END WRITERDEPTNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERJOBTITLE ELSE WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ END WRITERJOBTITLE, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE FROM VGONGRAMAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.ORGDOCID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.FORMID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HREF, TBL_APRDOCINFO.HASATTACHYN, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME2, TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTID, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCSTATE, TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCTITLE, CASE WHEN (TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME$lang$ = '' OR TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERNAME ELSE TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERNAME$lang$ END WRITERNAME, CASE WHEN (TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERDEPTNAME ELSE TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ END WRITERDEPTNAME, CASE WHEN (TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERJOBTITLE ELSE TBL_APRDOCINFO.WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ END WRITERJOBTITLE, TO_CHAR(TBL_APRDOCINFO.STARTDATE + (#offset# / (60 * 24)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.DOCID = #docID# AND ROWNUM = 1

insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_APROPINIONINFO ( DocID, UserID, OpinionGB, Content, UserName, UserName2, UserJobTitle, UserJobTitle2, UserDeptID, UserDeptName, UserDeptName2, OpinionSN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) SELECT #docID#, CN, #opinionGB#, #content#, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, TITLE, TITLE2, DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, (SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(OPINIONSN) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(OPINIONSN) + 1 END OPINIONSN FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID#), #tenantID#, #companyID# FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #userID#
insert.isNotEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_APROPINIONINFO ( DocID, UserID, OpinionGB, Content, UserName, UserName2, UserJobTitle, UserJobTitle2, UserDeptID, UserDeptName, UserDeptName2, OpinionSN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) SELECT #docID#, CN,#opinionGB#, #content#,U.DISPLAYNAME, U.DISPLAYNAME2, A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, U.DEPARTMENT, A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, (SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(OPINIONSN) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(OPINIONSN) + 1 END OPINIONSN FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID#), #tenantID#, #companyID# FROM TBL_USERMASTER U INNER JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO A ON U.CN = A.aprmemberid AND A.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.DOCID = #docID# AND U.CN = #userID# AND A.APRMEMBERSN = #aprMemberSN#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRDOCINFO SET HASOPINIONYN = #hasOpinionYN# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID#
UPDATE TBL_APROPINIONINFO SET CONTENT = #content# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# AND USERID = #userID# AND OPINIONSN = #opinionSN#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 = #absenteeInfo# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND CN = #userId#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 = NULL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #userId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# AND USERID = #userID# AND OPINIONSN = #opinionSN#
sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCID, ORGDOCID, FORMID, HREF, HASATTACHYN, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, DOCSTATE, DOCTITLE, APRMEMBERSN, CASE WHEN (WRITERNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERNAME ELSE WRITERNAME$lang$ END WRITERNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERDEPTNAME ELSE WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ END WRITERDEPTNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERJOBTITLE ELSE WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ END WRITERJOBTITLE FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# AND APRMEMBERSN IN (SELECT APRMEMBERSN FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE APRMEMBERID = #userID#) AND ROWNUM = 1

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND DOCID = #docId# AND APRMEMBERSN = #aprMemberSN# AND APRSTATE IN ('002', '005', '000')
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(DOCID) FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND DOCID = #docId# AND APRMEMBERSN = #aprMemberSN# AND APRSTATE IN ('002', '005', '000')

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#

select DEPARTMENT absenteeDeptId, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 absenteeInfo, DESCRIPTION deptName, DESCRIPTION2 deptName2, TITLE, TITLE2, '-1' jobId from TBL_USERMASTER U where CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# UNION All SELECT A.DEPTID , UNISTR(A.PROXY), B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2, TITLE, TITLE2, JOBID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #userID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_addjobmaster SET proxy = #absenteeInfo# WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND JOBID = #jobId# AND DEPTID = #deptId#
sqlMap.select: select e.APRMEMBERSN , e.APRMEMBERID , e.APRMEMBERDEPTID , e.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE , case when (u.cn = null and a.CN = null) then 'Y' else 'N' end as changeYn from tbl_endaprlineinfo e left join tbl_usermaster u on u.CN = e.APRMEMBERID and u.DEPARTMENT = e.APRMEMBERDEPTID and u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 = e.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE left join tbl_addjobmaster a on a.CN = e.APRMEMBERID and a.DEPTID = e.APRMEMBERDEPTID and (select j.displayname from tbl_user_jobmaster j where j.JOBID = a.JOBID ) = e.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE where DOCID = #v_DOCID#

SELECT A.DOCID, A.DOCNO, A.DOCTITLE, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERJOBTITLE, A.WRITERDEPTID, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.FORMID, B.FORMVERSION, CASE WHEN B.FORMVERSION = F.FORMVERSION THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS FORMCHANGYN FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = A.COMPANYID AND A.DOCID = B.DOCID JOIN TBL_FORMINFO F ON F.FORMID = A.FORMID AND F.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND F.COMPANYID = A.COMPANYID WHERE A.WRITERID = #v_WRITERID# AND A.WRITERDEPTID = #v_WRITERDEPTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND A.FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.ORGDOCID is null ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# ORDER BY APRMEMBERSN
SELECT * FROM TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRDOCINFO SET DOCID = #DOCID#, FORMID = #FORMID#, DOCTYPE = #DOCTYPE#, DOCSTATE = #DOCSTATE#, FUNCTIONTYPE = #FUNCTIONTYPE#, HREF = #HREF#, DOCTITLE = #DOCTITLE#, HASATTACHYN = #HASATTACHYN#, HASOPINIONYN = #HASOPINIONYN#, STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), WRITERID = #WRITERID#, WRITERNAME = #WRITERNAME#, WRITERJOBTITLE = #WRITERJOBTITLE#, WRITERDEPTID = #WRITERDEPTID#, WRITERDEPTNAME = #WRITERDEPTNAME#, ISPUBLIC = #ISPUBLIC#, WRITERNAME2 = #WRITERNAME2#, WRITERJOBTITLE2 = #WRITERJOBTITLE2#, WRITERDEPTNAME2 = #WRITERDEPTNAME2#, TENANT_ID = #TENANT_ID#, COMPANYID = #COMPANYID# WHERE DOCID = #DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #TENANT_ID#

UPDATE TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO SET DOCID = #DOCID#, SECURITYCODE = #SECURITYCODE#, STORAGEPERIOD = #STORAGEPERIOD#, KEYWORD = #KEYWORD#, FORMNAME = #FORMNAME#, COMPANYID = #COMPANYID#, ITEMCODE = #ITEMCODE#, ITEMNAME = #ITEMNAME#, URGENTAPPROVAL = #URGENTAPPROVAL#, SECURITYAPPROVAL = #SECURITYAPPROVAL#, TEMPATTRIBUTE = #TEMPATTRIBUTE#, STATUS = #STATUS#, SPECIALRECORDCODE = #SPECIALRECORDCODE#, PUBLICITYCODE = #PUBLICITYCODE#, LIMITRANGE = #LIMITRANGE#, PAGENUM = #PAGENUM#, CABINETID = #CABINETID#, TASKCODE = #TASKCODE#, SEPERATEATTACHXML = #SEPERATEATTACHXML#, SUMMARY = #SUMMARY#, FORMNAME2 = #FORMNAME2#, ITEMNAME2 = #ITEMNAME2#, TENANT_ID = #TENANT_ID#, PUBLICITYYN = #PUBLICITYYN#, FORMVERSION = #FORMVERSION# WHERE DOCID = #DOCID# AND COMPANYID = #COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APRLINEINFO ( DOCID, APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, RECEIVEDDATE, PROCESSDATE, REASONDONOTAPPROV, ISPROPOSERYN, ISBRIEFUSERYN, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( #DOCID#, #APRMEMBERSN#, #APRTYPE#, #APRSTATE#, #APRMEMBERID#, #APRMEMBERISDEPTYN#, #APRMEMBERNAME#, #APRMEMBERJOBTITLE#, #APRMEMBERDEPTID#, #APRMEMBERDEPTNAME#, #APRMEMBERLDAPPATH#, TO_DATE(#RECEIVEDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#PROCESSDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #REASONDONOTAPPROV#, #ISPROPOSERYN#, #ISBRIEFUSERYN#, #APRMEMBERNAME2#, #APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2#, #APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2#, #TENANT_ID#, #COMPANYID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_EXPAPRLINE ( DOCID, APRMEMBERSN, ORGUSERID, PROXYUSERID, PROXYUSERNAME, PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, PROXYUSERDEPTID, PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, PROXYUSERNAME2, PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2, PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( #DOCID#, #APRMEMBERSN#, #ORGUSERID#, #PROXYUSERID#, #PROXYUSERNAME#, #PROXYUSERJOBTITLE#, #PROXYUSERDEPTID#, #PROXYUSERDEPTNAME#, #PROXYUSERNAME2#, #PROXYUSERJOBTITLE2#, #PROXYUSERDEPTNAME2#, #TENANT_ID#, #COMPANYID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_RECEIPTPOINTINFO ( DOCID, RECEIPTPOINTID, RECEIPTPOINTNAME, EXTRECEPTYN, PROCESSYN, PROCESSSN, CANEDITYN, EXTRECEPTEMAIL, RECEIPTMEMBERID, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME, PROCESSDATE, RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE, DEPTMEMBERSN, RECEIPTPOINTNAME2, RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2, RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2, ROUTEYN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( #DOCID#, #RECEIPTPOINTID#, #RECEIPTPOINTNAME#, #EXTRECEPTYN#, #PROCESSYN#, #PROCESSSN#, #CANEDITYN#, #EXTRECEPTEMAIL#, #RECEIPTMEMBERID#, #RECEIPTMEMBERNAME#, #PROCESSDATE#, #RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE#, #DEPTMEMBERSN#, #RECEIPTPOINTNAME2#, #RECEIPTMEMBERJOBTITLE2#, #RECEIPTMEMBERNAME2#, #ROUTEYN#, #TENANT_ID#, #COMPANYID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#

SELECT CN, DISPLAYNAME, MAIL, DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, COMPANY, COMPANY2, TITLE, TITLE2, TELEPHONENUMBER, HOMEPHONE, FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, MOBILE, POSTALCODE, STREETADDRESS, POSITIONCD, BIRTH, BIRTHTYPE, IPADDRESS, LASTLOGIN, LOGINCNT, TENANT_ID, MANUAL_FLAG, LISTTYPE, PASSWORD_UPDATEDT, EXTENSIONPHONE, OFFICEMOBILE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APRATTACHINFO ( DOCID , ATTACHFILESN , VIEWORDER , ATTACHFILENAME , ATTACHFILEHREF , ATTACHFILESIZE , ATTACHUSERID , ATTACHUSERNAME , ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE , ATTACHUSERDEPTID , ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME , PAGENUM , DISPLAYNAME , BODYATTACH , AttachUserName2 , AttachUserJobTitle2 , AttachUserDeptName2 , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID, ISBIGATTACH, ISBIGATTACHDEL, SAVEDATE ) VALUES ( #v_DOCID# , #v_ATTACHFILESN# , #v_VIEWORDER# , #v_ATTACHFILENAME# , #v_ATTACHFILEHREF# , #v_ATTACHFILESIZE# , #v_ATTACHUSERID# , #v_ATTACHUSERNAME# , #v_ATTACHUSERJOBTITLE# , #v_ATTACHUSERDEPTID# , #v_ATTACHUSERDEPTNAME# , 1 , #v_DISPLAYNAME# , 'N' , #v_AttachUserName2# , #v_AttachUserJobTitle2# , #v_AttachUserDeptName2# , #v_TENANTID# , #v_COMPANYID# , 'N', 'N', SUBSTR( to_char(SYSDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 1, 10) )
sqlMap.select: SELECT APRMEMBERID, NVL(APRMEMBERNAME$v_LANG$, '') AS APRMEMBERNAME FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND APRMEMBERSN = #v_APRMEMBERSN#

SELECT COUNT(CN) FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, -16), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:mi') > TO_DATE(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:mi') AND SUBSTR(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, 1, INSTR(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, ':', 1, 1) -1) = #userID#
